report.markdown:
# Trading Agent Report: SPY

## Final Decision
- Decision: hold
- Confidence: 0.25

## Strategy
- Selected Strategy: momentum
- Latest Signal: Cash

## Backtest
- Total Return: 43.16%
- Benchmark Total Return: 131.27%
- Annual Return: 7.84%
- Annual Volatility: 12.25%
- Sharpe Ratio: 0.64
- Max Drawdown: -15.42%
- Benchmark Max Drawdown: -25.36%
- Win Rate: 37.98%
- Number of Trades: 98

## Risk Notice
This result is based on historical backtesting and is for educational use only. It is not financial advice.

logs: Start calculating MA, RSI, MACD and volatility
市场处于震荡状态，波动率正常，趋势信号不强，不适合激进追涨。
未启用真实 LLM，当前使用 mock 新闻摘要。
Apply volatility filter and stop-loss to ma signal
Calculate ma strategy returns vs benchmark
Apply volatility filter and stop-loss to rsi signal
Calculate rsi strategy returns vs benchmark
Apply volatility filter and stop-loss to momentum signal
Calculate momentum strategy returns vs benchmark
暂无相同资产和策略的历史记录。

quality_checks.detail: Ready for indicators, strategy, and backtest

gateway.insight: 行情数据完整，无明显缺失，可支持后续分析。
gateway.impact_on_decision: 数据完整，因此允许进入指标、回测和新闻综合决策阶段。

reasoning: 数据从缓存或远程源加载。

insight.en: Indicators calculated. RSI remains neutral, MACD momentum is moderate.
insight.zh: 指标计算完成，RSI 未进入超买或超卖区间，MACD 动能中性。

impact_on_decision.en: Technical indicators are neutral-to-mildly-bullish, but MACD momentum is insufficient for aggressive buying.
impact_on_decision.zh: 技术指标中性偏强，但 MACD 动能不足，因此不支持激进买入。

next_action.en: Wait for MACD momentum to strengthen further.
next_action.zh: 等待 MACD 进一步转强。

monitor_focus.zh: RSI 进入 50-65 稳定区间

monitor_focus.en: 20D volatility falls below the medium level

reasoning.en: Indicators calculated. RSI remains neutral, MACD momentum is moderate.
reasoning.zh: 指标计算完成，RSI 未进入超买或超卖区间，MACD 动能中性。

images.summary: 最新收盘 586.08 · 多头排列 · 信号 HOLD
images.insight: 当前 SPY 最新收盘 586.08，多头排列，RSI 中性，MACD 偏空，策略信号为 HOLD。
images.impact_on_decision: 图表摘要为决策调度室提供可视化依据，但最终仓位仍需结合风险报警室综合判断。
images.next_action: 持续观察价格与均线的偏离程度，以及回测夏普比率是否稳定。
monitor_focus: RSI 是否进入极值区间

strategy_signal.name: 20日动量
strategy_signal.reasoning: 20日收益率 (-2.91%) 为负，momentum 偏空，产生卖出/观望信号。
strategy_signal.reasoning_en: MA20/MA60 trend is positive; RSI is neutral; MACD is danger. The current strategy signal is HOLD with score 59.

reasoning: 20日收益率 (-2.91%) 为负，momentum 偏空，产生卖出/观望信号。

skills.summary: 20日动量 · 信号 HOLD · 评分 59.33 · 多因子 50.29
skills.insight: 20日收益率 (-2.91%) 为负，momentum 偏空，产生卖出/观望信号。
skills.impact_on_decision: 策略得分分布均匀，优势不明显，最终保持谨慎。
skills.next_action: 继续观察 Top 策略是否获得趋势确认。

current_strategy.name: momentum
current_strategy.reasoning: 20日收益率 (-2.91%) 为负，momentum 偏空，产生卖出/观望信号。
current_strategy.description: 动量策略：20日收益为正买入，为负卖出。

reasoning: 20日收益率 (-2.91%) 为负，momentum 偏空，产生卖出/观望信号。

alarm.summary: 限制仓位 · 42/100 · 仓位上限 40%
alarm.insight: 风险分数由最大回撤、波动率分位数和市场状态共同决定。
alarm.impact_on_decision: 风险门控限制激进买入，并降低建议仓位。
alarm.next_action: 等待风险分数下降到 35 以下。

reasoning: 回撤和波动率共同决定风险水平。

task_queues.insight: 回测总收益 43.2%，夏普 0.64，最大回撤 -15.4%。收益为正但 Sharpe 一般。
task_queues.impact_on_decision: 回测收益为正，但 Sharpe 一般且最大回撤较大，因此只能形成有限正向支持。

reasoning: 基于历史数据模拟策略表现。

insight.en: HOLD is not well supported. Consider reducing position size or waiting for confirmation. | Critic: News is neutral, but some agents signal BUY — HOLD may miss early momentum.
insight.zh: 最终选择 HOLD，等待进一步确认。

impact_on_decision.en: The final decision integrates all agent votes, constrained by the risk gate and Critic review to avoid aggressive entries.
impact_on_decision.zh: 最终决策整合所有 Agent 投票，由风险闸门和 Critic Review 限制激进买入。

Failure mode: If data source has delayed or incorrect close price, all signals could be stale.

summary.en: Final decision for SPY is HOLD. The momentum strategy signals HOLD, risk gate is Position Limited, and backtest validation is Cautious Pass.

summary.zh: 运行记录 7 条 · 平均收益 43.2% · 策略知识 12 条

insight.en: Strategy memory has accumulated 7 run records and 12 strategy knowledge entries (2 from literature).
insight.zh: 策略记忆库已积累 7 条运行记录和 12 条策略知识（含文献策略 2 条）。

impact_on_decision.en: Historical records exert a slight positive weight on the current strategy, but not enough to override risk constraints.
impact_on_decision.zh: 历史记录对当前策略形成轻微正向加权，但不足以覆盖风险约束。

next_action.en: Continue accumulating strategy performance under similar market regimes.
next_action.zh: 继续积累相似市场状态下的策略表现。

knowledge_base.name: MA Crossover
knowledge_base.paper: Edwards & Magee (1948), Technical Analysis of Stock Trends
knowledge_base.description: 双均线（短期/长期）交叉产生买卖信号。金叉买入，死叉卖出。
knowledge_base.description_en: Dual moving-average (short/long) crossover generates buy/sell signals: golden cross to buy, death cross to sell.

knowledge_base.name: RSI Momentum
knowledge_base.paper: Wilder (1978), New Concepts in Technical Trading Systems
knowledge_base.description: 利用 RSI 超买（>70）超卖（<30）区域判断反转时机。
knowledge_base.description_en: Uses RSI overbought (>70) and oversold (<30) zones to identify reversal timing.

knowledge_base.name: MACD Signal
knowledge_base.paper: Appel (1979), The Stock Option and No-Load Switch Fund Scalper's Manual
knowledge_base.description: MACD 线与信号线交叉 + 柱状图背离确认趋势方向。
knowledge_base.description_en: MACD line/signal-line crossovers plus histogram divergence confirm trend direction.

knowledge_base.name: Momentum (20D)
knowledge_base.paper: Jegadeesh & Titman (1993), Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers
knowledge_base.description: 以过去 20 日收益率为动量代理变量，正收益做多，负收益离场。
knowledge_base.description_en: Uses past 20-day return as a momentum proxy: go long on positive return, exit on negative.

knowledge_base.name: Multi-Agent LLM Voting
knowledge_base.paper: Xiao et al. (2025), TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework, AAAI
knowledge_base.description: Data/News/Technical/Risk/Decision 五个Agent协作，通过投票+辩论达成共识决策。
knowledge_base.description_en: Five agents (Data/News/Technical/Risk/Decision) collaborate and reach consensus via voting and debate.

knowledge_base.name: FinRL-DeepSeek RL
knowledge_base.paper: Benhenda (2025), FinRL-DeepSeek: LLM-Infused Risk-Sensitive RL for Trading Agents
knowledge_base.description: LLM 注入的 PPO/A2C 强化学习框架，带有风险敏感机制。
knowledge_base.description_en: LLM-infused PPO/A2C reinforcement learning framework with risk-sensitive mechanisms.

knowledge_base.name: FinRL Ensemble (5-Agent)
knowledge_base.paper: Liu et al. (2020), FinRL: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading
knowledge_base.description: A2C + PPO + DDPG + SAC + TD3 五算法集成，通过Sharpe比率加权投票。
knowledge_base.description_en: Ensemble of A2C, PPO, DDPG, SAC and TD3 algorithms weighted by Sharpe-ratio voting.

knowledge_base.name: MADDQN + TimesNet
knowledge_base.paper: Huang et al. (2024), A multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for optimizing financial trading strategies based on TimesNet
knowledge_base.description: 多Agent Double DQN 配 TimesNet 时序网络，一Agent追收益一Agent管风险。
knowledge_base.description_en: Multi-agent Double DQN with TimesNet temporal network: one agent targets returns, another manages risk.

knowledge_base.name: MARL for HFT
knowledge_base.paper: Wei et al. (2024), Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for High-Frequency Trading Strategy Optimization
knowledge_base.description: VDN + MAPPO 协调高频交易Agent，Sharpe 2.87，最大回撤 12.3%。
knowledge_base.description_en: VDN + MAPPO coordinate high-frequency trading agents; reported Sharpe 2.87, max drawdown 12.3%.

knowledge_base.name: Multi-Timeframe MADRL
knowledge_base.paper: López Figueroa (2025), A multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework using multiple timeframe data for algorithmic trading
knowledge_base.description: 分层 MADRL 架构：小时/日/周专用 Agent 输入 Meta-Agent 决策，S&P 500 上收益 21.58%，Sharpe 1.69。
knowledge_base.description_en: Hierarchical MADRL with hour/day/week specialist agents feeding a meta-agent; reported S&P 500 return 21.58%, Sharpe 1.69.

knowledge_base.name: Multi-Asset MARL
knowledge_base.paper: Cheng & Sun (2024), Multiagent-based deep reinforcement learning framework for multi-asset adaptive trading and portfolio management
knowledge_base.description: 合作式 MARL 系统同时管理多资产，动态调整配置，提升 Sharpe 和下行保护。
knowledge_base.description_en: Cooperative MARL system manages multiple assets simultaneously, dynamically adjusting allocation to improve Sharpe and downside protection.

knowledge_base.name: FLAG-TRADER
knowledge_base.paper: Xiong et al. (2025), FLAG-TRADER: Fusion LLM-Agent with Gradient-based Reinforcement Learning for Financial Trading
knowledge_base.description: LLM Agent 与梯度强化学习融合，自然语言推理 + 可微分策略优化。
knowledge_base.description_en: Fuses LLM agents with gradient-based reinforcement learning, combining natural-language reasoning and differentiable policy optimization.

reflection.reflection: 当前 20 日收益为负，依据 Jegadeesh & Titman (1993) 的动量效应，短期趋势偏空。 MA20 上穿 MA60，符合 Edwards & Magee (1948) 的趋势跟踪原则。 历史记录中该策略仅有 1 条可计算收益记录（43.20%），样本不足，应谨慎外推。
reflection.reflection_en: The current 20-day return is negative; per Jegadeesh & Titman (1993), short-term momentum is bearish. MA20 is above MA60, consistent with Edwards & Magee (1948) trend-following principles. Only 1 return-calculable record (43.20%) exists for this strategy; sample is too small to extrapolate.

recommendations.reason: 均线金叉支持趋势跟踪。
recommendations.reason_en: Moving-average golden cross supports trend following.

reasoning: 暂无相同资产和策略的历史记录。

insight.en: Latest analysis for SPY is complete. Decision: HOLD. Agents have returned to the break room.
insight.zh: 最新分析 SPY 已完成，决策为 观望。Agent 返回休息室待命。

impact_on_decision.en: The break room does not participate in the current decision; it only shows system standby status.
impact_on_decision.zh: 休息室不参与当前决策，仅展示系统待命状态。

next_action.en: Waiting for the user to submit the next analysis task.
next_action.zh: 等待用户提交下一次分析任务。

ready_message.zh: 系统已就绪，等待下一次任务

reasoning: Agents return to idle after the pipeline completes; the break room reflects system readiness.
